name: Cardio Diagnostics Holdings, Inc.
summary: Cardio Diagnostics Holdings, Inc. is a molecular diagnostics company focused on cardiovascular disease (CVD) detection using epigenetic and AI-driven technologies. The company offers Epi+Gen CHD and PrecisionCHD, commercially available blood-based tests that leverage DNA methylation biomarkers to assess coronary heart disease risk. Its technology is built on a licensed platform from the University of Iowa Research Foundation and targets patients, healthcare professionals, and other key clinical channels.

products.name: Epi+Gen CHD
products.description: Epigenetic blood-based test for coronary heart disease risk assessment using DNA methylation biomarkers.

products.name: PrecisionCHD
products.description: Commercially available molecular diagnostic test for coronary heart disease detection leveraging epigenetic and AI technology.

partnerships.description: Non-exclusive license of core epigenetic technology and technical information used in Cardio's diagnostic tests.
At-the-market sales agent for Common Stock offerings under Sales Agreement entered January 26, 2024.
